articles.title: Trump's Goal In China? Keep It Simple
articles.summary: Expectations are running high for the US-China summit in Beijing, but Trump’s main goal should be to not make things worse, the Editorial Board writes. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Brazil Meat Left Out of EU Suppliers List in Risk to Trade
articles.summary: Brazil is absent from a list of countries authorized to supply animal products to the European Union, presenting a trade risk to the world’s largest beef and chicken exporter.

articles.title: Japan’s Sojitz Eyes Southeast Asia for New Rare Earths Supply

articles.title: China’s Manufacturing Heartland Tested by Iran War Energy Shock
articles.summary: Economic activity in China’s most important manufacturing hub is heaping pressure on power supplies, sparking an energy stress test as the Iran war chokes shipments of fuel.

articles.title: Gold Slides Lower as US Inflation Clouds Fed Easing Outlook
articles.summary: Gold fell as the latest US economic data showed inflation accelerated on rising energy and food prices, reducing odds of monetary easing by the Federal Reserve this year.

articles.title: Emerging-Market Currencies, Stocks Fall as Iran Truce Hopes Dim
articles.summary: Emerging-market currencies and stocks fell Tuesday on concern the ceasefire between the US and Iran is on the brink of collapse, while a slump in South Korean shares also weighed on sentiment.
